title: AI-SearchPlanner: Reinforcement Learning for Efficient Search Planning with Frozen QA Models

defines.name: AI-SearchPlanner
defines.definition: A reinforcement learning framework that improves end-to-end QA by training a small search-planning LLM while using a large frozen LLM for answer generation.

problem: Existing RL-based search agents use one LLM for both planning and answering, making it difficult to optimize search planning and QA quality simultaneously while keeping inference efficient.
